1.content: How do you cross paths with Taekwondo Black Belt Tiffiny?
1.title: Meeting Tiffiny

11.content:
"G'Day Mate, ready for another lesson? If you do exceptional today, I might promote you to a yellow belt" Tiff said in a warm inviting tone. Her accent and kindness just melted your heart.

"Its best we warm up, so lets begin, whatdya think" she flashes a smile and you both commence the warm up.

After warming up, you get to what you started taking lessons for... the kicks.

"Now this is arguably the best part of taekwondo, but for someone like me there is something better... but I'll show you it in the future"

You nod excitedly and are waiting for her instructions. Tiffiny chambers a kick, and she explains that this is called a sidekick. In slow motion she extends her leg out and the blade of her foot makes contact with your face which mildly cracks your neck back.

"Hahaha sorry mate, I didn't mean to put my foot in your face, I've been so use to sparring that I'm hardwired on making contact" she says apologetically.

You tell it was perfectly fine and you understand. Your face reddens a bit and you ask her if she could demonstrate it again so you'd know how to execute the kick.

Her expression doesn't change and she optimistically agrees and says, "okay mate, hold still... I'll do it in slow mo again so you can see how I do every step"

Inside, your mind was going haywire and was so excited to meet her foot again.

Tiff chambers again and extends her foot towards your face. She exclaims a "HIYAH" and her warm sole was planted on your face. You inhaled as much as you can before she moved her foot down and her hiyah really sent goosebumps across your body.

You thank sensei and ask if theres any other kicks she could demonstrate. She says of course but she doesn't want to overwhelm you with so many different kicks when you're still only a white belt.

"Well I hope you understood how to do the sidekick, do you need a few more demos before I ask you to perform it"

You nod and she grabs your hand. Her hand is warm and soft, leaving this blanket of comfort over you.

"Ya know, in martial arts you outta be real loose and floppy over being tense... could you knead my palms real quick"

You say nothing and begin on her big warm hands. She flexes her fingers out and you interlock your own fingers and wiggle them around. Her face has a face of satisfaction, clearly you were doing a good job.

"Gosh your hands are a bit cold, I hope your whole body isn't cold and stiff, you could end up pulling something mate"

She moves both her palms into your face and rubs them up and down. The sensation is wonderful and all really thought has left your mind. You begin planting kisses on her palms, after a few seconds, you realize what you've done and stop dead in your tracks. Youre paralyzed from embarrassment.

"Why'd you stop mate, boy that sure was a nice feeling" she said a bit naive to your interests.

"Anyways, I'm much better now. Back to those kicks yeah... Im excited, how bout you?!"

She grabs your hand and you interlock fingers. She chambers and exclaims KIYAH as her foot was rammed into your face. She held her foot in your face then did a hook kick, slapping your face around. You stagger back a bit but Tiff pulls you back in.

"Op where do you think you're going fella, no one gets away from the Tiff special before its over'

Hearing that transported you back to not thinking. She grinded her warm foot into your face and you exclaimed thank you master.

How'd she react
11.title: Her Student

114.content:
You felt time freeze, you were being exceptionally weird to your sensei and you showed how quickly your composure could break.

However as you snapped back into your senses, nothing had really changed. Tiff was still pummeling you with her kicks. Suddenly she halts from kicking you and for a brief few seconds you wonder if she processed what you had exclaimed prior.

Again, her foot slaps across your face causing you to release an oof.

"HAHAH oh mate, you were not expecting that one. Seems like you had enough for a bit, how does a break sound"

You're panting a bit and weren't in much of a talking mood and Tiff said, "Hey I'm gonna run to my office real and just check some records... I'll be ready for round two afterwards. Ooh its gonna be such a treat, I have some more kicks I want to show you"

You watched sensei walk off into the other room, the dirt of her soles caught your attention. After a bit you had some energy left and decided to crawl towards her office. She's busy typing imputing whatever she has to do.

You crawl up next to her, shes still in her white gi, and she says, "boy I really did a number, I didn't mean to make your legs stop working"

You're still in the state of no caring, and you move your way under her desk and lay on your back. You grab one foot and start massaging it, kneading all across her soles.

She's taken back by the sudden gesture, "Oh sweetie, no you don't have to do... wow wow wow your hands are magical. You don't know how much stress these puppies go through each session. You wouldn't mind keeping that up while I do some work up here"

You kiss her foot and she takes that as a yes. She plants her other foot on your face and begins rubbing it into your face.
For an hour you lay there kissing, massaging, and smelling her feet.

Tiff then taps your face with her foot and tells ya her work is done. You rise up but only to your knees since your body hasn't had time to rest.

"Gosh mate, that was great. I feel rejuvenated to the max... I could kick you for hours. Well only if you could handle it" she says laughing and grinning.

Your vision hadn't fully adjusted from the dark under the desk so Tiff waves her hand in front of you, signaling if you're present.

Tiff grabs your face with her big hands and transfers the warmth of them to you. "This outta wake up your cognitive thought fella, are you with me yet"

The warmth was getting the blood flowing but not in your head, it was flowing to your woody who has been growing steady over the course of this lesson.
114.title: No reaction

choices: My palms need cleaning as well
12.content:
Times were tough and money was in dire need. The job hunt proved to be a waste of time and bills needed to be paid. Odd jobs could no longer cut it, you needed something immediate and rewarding.

Scoping around town, you didn't want to hit a big place that would lead to endless heat, and you didn't want to hit a little store that would destroy the lives of some hard-workers.

You thought a martial arts gym would be perfect, most of the gear is insured and the cops wouldn't look that hard for gym equipment.

When the dojo had closed around 8 and it was decently dark, you made your move. Draped in a black hoodie and ski mask, there was no way anyone could identify you. Through the backdoor, you picked the lock and made your way in.

Thinking no one could possibly be there, you casually walk through, eyeing what would fetch you the most money.

As you stroll through looking, you come into a room with a woman at a desk.

Her big tough looking feet are placed on her desk, and she looks like she's taking a nap.

However your heavy steps had woken her up and her eyes grow a bit wide asking, "G'day mate, what brings you in"

You approach her slowly and she gets up, preparing for whatever is about to happen.

You try explaining the situation, and as you close in, you throw a punch at her.

She grabs your arm and swings you into the rolling chair that she was previously napping on. You roll back and hit the wall. This puts you in a daze and all you hear are the sounds of her bare feet running towards you.

"KIYAH" she exclaims firing off a front kick into your face. Then Tiff does a hook kick and slaps your face around.
12.title: Robber

info.brief_description: You come across Tiffiny Hall and she finds a way to kick you

-Keep it in second or third person
